bikes.description: The bike was stolen with a large wooden box attached to the back (dimensions: ~2x2x1 [LxWxH]).  It has a black phone holder on the left side of the handle bars.  There is a circular side mirror on the left side of the bike.  Stolen on 08/18/2025 from Renton, WA.  There was a black hand pump located on the lower bike brace attached to a black water bottle holder.  Black bike with orange text on the cross brace ("Rad Power Bikes").
bikes.title: 2020 Rad Power Bikes Rad City 4

bikes.description: 1990ish.  Shimano XT 3 by 9 drivetrain.  Mechanical disc brakes. Alu front basket and red cargo net.  Pedals are flat on one side, Crank brothers on the other.  Very good condition/
bikes.title: Gary Fisher

bikes.description: Has the addition of side mirrors and schwalbe replacement tires
bikes.frame_model: Rad City 5 Plus Electric Commuter Bike
bikes.title: 2024 Rad Power Bikes Rad City 5 Plus Electric Commuter Bike

bikes.description: Has a brand new bike rack from Decathlon (not sold in the US), metal ring bell on the right side of the handlebar (very rare, again not sold in the US) and phone holder. U-lock on the frame under the seat.
bikes.title: 2021 REI Co-op City 1.1

bikes.description:
I came outside this morning 12/7/24 to find my prized commuter had disappeared from my backyard. Near City Park and Mountain. Likely stolen in the night. It was a barn find that I rebuilt and added many non-stock parts parts to, and I haven't seen seen anything similar to it around town. Unfortunately I did not write down the serial number, but I will be filing reports with Bike Index and the city.

~1994 Red Specialized Crossroads in XL/Large with White Decals

UPANBIKE butterfly bars Wrapped in Red (Most Distinctive)
Black Avid Speed Dial Brake Levers
Koski V-Brake front/ Avid Single Digit Rear Calipers
No-name 3x8 Speed Shifters
Shimano Deore LX Rear Derailleur
Vintage Shimano Exage? Front Derailleur
Puroma Red Pedals
Black Easton Front Wheel - Specialized Sawtooth Tire
Dura-Ace Hub With Mavic Rim Rear Wheel - Goodyear Transit Speed Tire
Silver Sunrace 11-40t Cassette on the Rear Wheel (Big Gear on back wheel)
Bontrager Seat

Other Stuff:

Faded Brown REI Flash Pannier on left side
Jim Blackburn Bottle Cage and JBlackburn Rear Rack
Adjustable Bottle Cage on seat tube
RockBros Tubetop Bag and Frame Bag
Polar Colorado Water Bottle
Red Phone Mount
Blitzu Bike Light (Paint Heavily Faded)
OnGuard U Lock (Unlocked)
bikes.title: 1994 Specialized Crossroads

bikes.description:
RadCity bike, in pretty rough condition. Evidently was stolen, I purchased from a second(?) owner after searching on BikeIndex + reporting to RadPower to match serial number to original owner (but there was no record).

Back rack sheared on one side of fram. Bad re-paint job over frame of bike, with white spray paint on the serial number. Bike stolen without battery.
bikes.title: Rad Power Bikes Rad City

bikes.description:
My bike got stolen either Friday (October 11) at night or anytime Saturday (October 12th) from the 4th level parking garage of my apartment complex on the east side.
It’s an all city bike model: SPACE HORSE TIAGRA https://allcitycycles.com/bikes/space_horse_tiagra 
I just had taken it to get a tune up at DogSpeed Cycle and got new tires installed: Vitorria urbano: https://vittoria.com/products/urbano?variant=46921118187808&utm_source=google&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=Vittoria%20US%20Google%20Feed&utm_content=Urbano&gad_source=1&gbraid=0AAAAADOK2zf6DNdcqUBHd-xWtAzJBNH3B&gclid=Cj0KCQiA_qG5BhDTARIsAA0UHSILBCDrWQq_IbBOyyN5rJyV1NR__YbA7RxYjsVey-m9hiflIPhg2TwaAslDEALw_wcB
Bought it at cycle east in December 2023 before they closed. Any help locating it is greatly appreciated.
bikes.title: 2023 All City Space Horse Tiagra

bikes.description: A typical black Dutch city bike with a typical Dutch ring lock attached to the back of the frame to lock the back wheel and black bike bag with a white fluorescent stripe at either side of the back luggage carrier. Stolen at Santa Rosa North railway station.
bikes.title: 2011 Batavus Typical Dutch Bike Frame

bikes.description: Black Rad Power "City 5" bike. Roughly 3200 miles on the odometer. Significant scratches and scrapes on the frame, mostly on the right side, from a previous fall. Had a black caribeaner on the handlebars. Standard rear rack and standard (small) headlight. Nearly brand new chain and gear cassette. Separate rechargable headlight on the handlebars.
bikes.title: 2022 Rad Power Bikes City 5 High-Step

bikes.description: E-bike, class 2, 20mph, 750Watt, step-through, upright seating position, seat locked onto bike, headlight, taillight, side mirror, matt black with orange lettering, lime green water bottle holder, black basket over back wheel, broken green basket on front, Protected  by micro technology GPS tracker sticker.
bikes.title: Rad Power Bikes Rad City Step Through

bikes.description: Black bike. Orange lettering. Side mirror. Comfort seat
bikes.title: Rad Power Bikes Rad City 4

bikes.description: My bike was stolen in July 2024. It was all black but was repainted all orange. It is a single speed bike with a single brake in the front. Rear tire is red with a line of green on the wear area. Rear wheel bearing are not good and the wheel is set on the freewheel side (the wheel can be reversed to get a freewheel or no freewheel).
bikes.title: Ibke Old

bikes.description: Matt black, manufacturing date: 10/20/2020 (Taiwan),  Satin Nearly Black / Black Reflective / Medium
bikes.title: 2020 Specialized Vado Turbo SL

bikes.description:
All Black Cannondale Mountainbike. Has a rear mountain pannier rack as well as a clamp mounted around the front handlebar on the left side.

Frame also has a water bottle holder mounted on the front bar, and a pump clasp on the straight up bar
bikes.title: 2023 Cannondale Trail 7

bikes.description:
Aspero GRX RX600 build
Bare carbon Repair on non-drive side seat stay 
Makeshifter snackhole stem bag x2, jandd half frame bag, swift industries zeitgeist handlebar bag, fjallraven front rack, Abraham's water bottle, simworks water bottle
River city bicycles rainbow sticker on seat tube, bike farm sticker on down tube,  my other bike is existential dread sticker on drive side chainstays.
bikes.title: 2022 Cervélo Aspero GRX RX600

bikes.description:
Ambition helps motivate us. It helps us strive for more and reach new goals.

The X Ambition is built for more. More miles, more adventures, more smiles! You may know the Poseidon X and the X Ambition is the more improved version. We focused on improved comfort with a more upright riding position and a new saddle design. We increased braking power by adding the same brakes as the Redwood and completed the build with 700 x 40 Kenda Happy Medium tires for good speed on the road and grip on gravel.
bikes.title: 2024 Poseidon Prowheel gravel

bikes.description:
Asking for help recovering my bike, in case anyone sees anything please reach out! I use it as my primary form of transportation and it was stolen out of a locked car last night on 145th NE in Seattle. It’s a Liv BeLiv women’s small bike teal frame. It has brown with dark circles handle bar tape, an emerald city ride outrider support rider bib on the front from Cascade Bicycle Club, a teal flower pattern handle bar bag, front handlebar headlight rear light on seat post, colorful light son the front and rear tires, a brown brooks leather saddle and reflective adhesive strips on the front and rear forks. It has both drop and upper handle bar breaks and older starting to crack on the side wall brown commuter tires that are smoother in the center and knobby on the edges. It down shifts rough in the mid gears due to a bent derailleur which has not yet been repaired and has single sided spd clear pedals and black plastic fenders. The rear fender is held on with zip ties. there’s an extra waterbottle holder also zip tied on the top cross bar and a handlebar phone mount bag. 

The first image is an older photo before I put the commuter bits on it but it’s the clearest I have.
bikes.title: Giant Beliv

bikes.description:
Has heavy wear on the top tube near the handles due to rubbing from bike lock.

Bike was bought secondhand in 2017.
bikes.title: Myka

bikes.description: REI Co-op Cycles DRT 1.1 Mountain Bike. Color is 'pirate black', looks black/gray in person. Says 'co-op' in white lettering on the side. Has a white waterbottle holder and a kick stand. At the time it was stolen it had an old cable bike lock attached to the handle bars/frame. Also had a phone mount attached to handle bars. Wheel size is 27.5 inches, bike has 21 gears. Stolen from bike rack on car in hotel parking lot in downtown Salt Lake City, Utah.
bikes.title: 2022 REI Co-op DRT 1.1 Mountain Bike

bikes.title: 2022 Trek Alpha Gold Aluminium, Duo Trap S-comp...

bikes.description: Black bell on the left side. Broken bell and phone holder on the right side. Handlebars are missing handlebar plugs. Some scratches on battery and body of bike.
bikes.title: 2022 Rad Power Bikes Rad City 5

bikes.frame_model: RAD City Electric Commuter Bike V4
bikes.title: 2021 Rad Power Bikes RAD City Electric Commuter Bike V4

bikes.description:
it's quite old been around town for a long time, has a rounded red light on the back,
 a little scratched up and has little paint from an old coating that was orange. It's a light weight bike so easy to pick up,
 the gears are fixed to one gear even though the back wheel has several speeds
 (it can potentially shift into (couldn't afford a gear shift)).
 The front tire has a tiny hole that gives out after a certain amount of hours about 4-6 hours and 
has a air valve converter attached to the front tire and a layer to underneath the tire to protect the tire from thorns/glass/ etc. 
 The tires gives out again in 4-6 hours (High pressured tire 110-120 PSI ).
bikes.title: 2001 Quintana Roo

bikes.description: Black step-thru ebike, stolen without battery. Left and right side mirrors on the handlebars. Phone mount on the handlebars. Metal bottle cage on the right-hand side. "See you space cowboy..." sticker on the left-hand side, some anime stickers on the right hand side, a "Spread the the love" sticker on the rear fender. Paint on the rear rack is a little worn. Bike is otherwise clean and in good conditon. Black metal front basket with wood panel. Black kryptonite U-lock attached to rear rack. Attached photos are several months old.
bikes.title: 2021 Rad Power Bikes Rad City 5 Plus

bikes.description: Ancheer 16 Inch Wheel 250W Folding City Commuter Electric Bike with customization. Black with blue letters.

It has 27.5" wheels, tubeless tires with pink valve stems, maxxis tires, fox suspension with Giant's signature Maestro pivot system and a saddle pouch on the bottom side of the seat.
